name: Battle Universe 2D
description: Battle Universe 2D is an exhilarating arcade-style game where players command a spaceship in a dynamic 2D universe. As the pilot, you must navigate through cosmic landscapes, dodging asteroids and hostile aliens. Website Developer <a href='https://www.freecrazygames.io/'>https://www.freecrazygames.io/</a>
instructions: WASD - CONTROLL the ship MOUSE - shooting
tags: 2D, Arcade, Fire, Spaceship, Unity3D, War, WebGL
